# Test: class_static_methods - simple static method calls
class MathHelper:
    def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
        return a + b
    
    def square(x: int) -> int:
        return x * x

result1 = MathHelper.add(3, 7)
print(result1)

result2 = MathHelper.square(5)
print(result2)

result3 = MathHelper.add(result2, 10)
print(result3)

# 25
